reviews.text: Christine photographed our wedding in Lyons in January 2026. Things we loved about working with Christine: She met with us before we hired her (in-person at a brewery we chose close to our home in Boulder) to talk through her work style and vibe. She responded super quickly via email leading up to the event. Christine brought a very calm and chill energy to our wedding. Afterward, she mailed us a beautiful package with some prints and a whole album that she compiled. We are planning to order more of these albums from her to give to our parents because they are so nice. And, most importantly, the photos are GREAT!!

We truly could not have asked for a better wedding photographer than Christine! From the very first interaction, she was incredibly personal, kind, and easy to work with. Communication was effortless; she made it so easy to reach out, ask questions, and feel confident throughout the entire planning process. Since we came from out of state and planned a small elopement, having someone we could fully trust meant everything, and she went above and beyond to make sure every detail was taken care of. When we traveled out to meet Christine before the wedding, she was even able to fit in a spur-of-the-moment engagement shoot, which was such a fun and meaningful bonus we’ll always be grateful for.

She was extremely helpful in guiding us to the perfect locations in the Colorado mountains, and offering thoughtful suggestions that made our day feel seamless and special. On our wedding day, she brought such a calming and fun energy that instantly put us at ease. She made us feel so comfortable, natural, and truly celebrated the entire day, which made the experience even more meaningful for us.

When we received our photos we were absolutely blown away! Not only were they delivered earlier than expected, they were everything we could have dreamed of and more! We will cherish them forever and cannot recommend Christine enough to anyone looking for a photographer who truly cares and delivers beyond expectations!

We hired Christine and Antler Run Photography for both our engagement and wedding ceremony shoots. We could not be happier with the results. Working with Christine was an absolute joy, and she made the process entirely stress-free. I highly recommend her and Antler Run for anyone in need of a wedding photographer, or photographer period.

From our very first cafe meeting to our at-home engagement shoot, and finally to our big day, Mike and Christine were an absolute 10/10! They took this awkward duo and worked their magic, giving us the most stunning photos and videos that celebrate our marriage. Their talent, professionalism, and go with the flow attitudes made the entire experience effortless and so fun. There truly aren’t enough words to thank them for capturing these memories so beautifully! I would definitely recommend their services to the next couple and will definitely use them again in the future 😊

If you are looking for an amazing photography (and videography) team, Christine and Mike are your people! We picked Antler Run because of Christine’s considerate initial communication and portfolio highlighting my desired moody editing style, and we’re so glad we did! Throughout the whole process, they were incredibly responsive and happily answered any of our questions. We had an amazing engagement shoot with them, where they braved frigid winter winds on Echo Lake to get the dramatic mountain backdrop I was hoping for. The pictures (and bonus video) turned out incredible, of course. On the day of the wedding, Christine and Mike arrived promptly and quickly went to work making sure to capture my requested shot list in the limited set up time we had been allotted. Their organization, attention to detail, communication, and professionalism was evident both in their day-of process and the results that were delivered. My mom also noted that during the entire wedding day they were able to be present for all the action without ever seeming in the way. We are overwhelmed (in a good way!) with the number of high quality images from our wedding day, and we couldn’t be happier with a photographer & videographer than we are with Antler Run. Friends and family liken our wedding video preview to a movie trailer, and all the work we received from them is just beyond our wildest dreams. It’s truly their camera magic that documented our day in cover-worthy glory, and we so appreciated the print and photo book that comes with their package. Their work was worth every penny and then some. Thank you Christine and Mike!
